source_pr.title: pkg/server/tests/commontest: increase TestAuditPluginRetrying eventually timeout to 30s
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #66342

Problem Summary:

This PR is only a test-stability attempt for `TestAuditPluginRetrying`.

From the flaky CI run (`ghpr_unit_test` run `52938`, node `64`), the test failed 3 times with `Condition never satisfied` at `pkg/server/tests/commontest/tidb_test.go:3741`.
At the same time, each failed attempt still showed heavy retry activity (`session.go:1208` retry logs on `auto_retry_test`) with hundreds of retry/write-conflict lines, so retries did happen but the current 10s window was sometimes too short for the count-based eventually condition.

### What changed and how does it work?

Only one line changed in `TestAuditPluginRetrying`:

- Increase `require.Eventually` timeout from `time.Second*10` to `time.Second*30`.

This does not change logic or assertions; it only gives the existing retry-observation loop a larger window under CI load/contention.

- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test

  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Commands run:

- `make failpoint-enable && (pushd pkg/server/tests/commontest >/dev/null && go test -run '^TestAuditPluginRetrying$' -tags=intest,deadlock -count=1 && popd >/dev/null); rc=$?; make failpoint-disable; exit $rc`
- `make lint`

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility
